channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Anna Wintour attends 2026 Met Gala as protests erupt over Bezos' sponsorship
item.description: The 2026 Met Gala took place at the Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York City, with Anna Wintour, former chief of Vogue, leading the event. This year's theme, 'Fashion is Art,' was inspired by the C...

item.title: Florida Republican Candidate Highlights Fundraising Success and Supports GOP Agenda Ahead of Midterms
item.description: Scott Singer, former Republican mayor of Boca Raton and a first-time congressional candidate, is projecting optimism for the GOP ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. Singer reported a strong first-qua...

item.title: Three die after rescue boat capsizes off NSW North Coast
item.description: In a tragic incident off the New South Wales North Coast, three people have lost their lives after a rescue boat capsized overnight. Authorities have confirmed the fatalities, though the circumstances...

item.title: Western Sydney YouTubers host special appearance by Meghan Markle for followers
item.description: Western Sydney-based YouTubers Sean and Marley, who collectively have over one million subscribers, recently created a buzz online by arranging a surprise appearance of The Duchess of Sussex, Meghan M...

item.title: Strategies for Engaging with Classic Literature in a Distracted World
item.description: Over the past decade and a half, university students have shown a declining patience for reading long-form literature, often opting for audiobooks instead. Neuroscientist Maryanne Wolf suggests that t...

item.title: BJP Wins West Bengal Assembly Elections, TMC Suffers Major Loss
item.description: In a historic shift in West Bengal politics, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has secured a decisive victory in the 2026 state assembly elections, ending a long period of Trinamool Congress (TMC) domi...

item.title: Witness alleges police misconduct during Senzo Meyiwa murder investigation
item.description: A new witness, Mandlenkosi Goodman Zondo, testified in the Pretoria high court regarding alleged police misconduct in the case of the late South African footballer Senzo Meyiwa, who was killed during ...

item.title: Highlights of the Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet Fashion
item.description: The Met Gala 2026 took place with the theme “Fashion is Art,” presenting a particularly abstract dress code that challenged attendees to celebrate depictions of the dressed body across history. The ex...

item.title: Mythos AI Highlights Existing Cybersecurity Vulnerabilities Without Changing the Fundamental Threat Landscape
item.description: In April 2026, Anthropic unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, a highly capable AI model able to detect and exploit software vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed. During controlled evaluations, the AI ide...

item.title: Australian mother defends teenage daughter after inappropriate comment at café
item.description: An Australian mother received widespread praise online after defending her teenage daughter against an inappropriate comment made by a man at Routley’s Bakery in Torquay, Victoria. While the mother an...

item.title: Google Pixel 11 May Offer Lower RAM Options Amid Global Memory Shortage
item.description: Google's upcoming Pixel 11 lineup is expected to face adjustments in memory configurations due to a global RAM shortage. Leaks indicate that the base Pixel 11 may reduce its RAM from 12GB to 8GB, whil...

item.title: Santiago landfill identified as world’s largest methane-emitting waste site by UN study
item.description: A major landfill near Santiago, Chile, has been identified by the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) as the world’s largest human-made source of methane emissions. The site, Lomas Los Colorad...

item.title: Swamp Deer Translocation in Madhya Pradesh Shows Positive Population Growth
item.description: A new conservation initiative in Madhya Pradesh has successfully translocated hard-ground swamp deer from Kanha Tiger Reserve to Satpura Tiger Reserve, with encouraging results. Between 2015 and 2023,...

item.title: Jay Sonza freed from NBI after posting bail
item.description: Veteran broadcaster Jay Sonza was released from the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) detention center on May 4, 2026, after he posted bail. The release came following his arrest in connection wi...

item.title: Labour ministers caution MPs against leadership challenge after poor local election results
item.description: Cabinet ministers have warned Labour MPs against attempting to remove Keir Starmer following potentially disastrous local election results this week, stressing that such a move could cause lasting cha...

item.title: Calgary police safely resolve weapons-related incident in Thorncliffe neighbourhood
item.description: On Monday morning, residents of the 6000 block of Trollinger Street Northeast in Calgary were advised to shelter in place following a weapons-related call in the Thorncliffe community. The call came i...

item.title: Priscilla Ojo talks trust and loyalty in her marriage with Juma Jux
item.description: Nigerian influencer and entrepreneur Priscilla Ojo don talk about how trust and discipline dey important for marriage, especially when you marry person wey dey public eye. For interview with WithChude...

item.title: California regulators move to suspend State Farm over mishandled wildfire claims
item.description: California insurance regulators have filed a legal action seeking to suspend State Farm's license for up to a year and impose the largest fine ever against a state insurer. The Department of Insurance...

item.title: NNPCL Partners With Chinese Firms to Restart Port Harcourt and Warri Refineries
item.description: The Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPCL) don enter Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with two Chinese companies, Sanjiang Chemical Company Limited and Xingcheng (Fuzhou) Industrial Park...

item.title: US-Based Kenyan Pleads Guilty to Murder of Former Partner
item.description: A Kenyan man residing in the United States, Nobert Matara, has pleaded guilty to first-degree murder in the death of his former partner, 31-year-old Tracy Nyariki. The incident, which has left both th...
